creator: 林一二
title: linonetwo/tidgi-feature-analytics
cpl.title: $:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-feature-analytics
cpl.author: linonetwo
cpl.name: TidGi Feature Analytics
cpl.description: Track preset plugin feature usage in TidGi Desktop default wiki via TidGi IPC analytics bridge
cpl.readme:
!! TidGi Feature Analytics

Automatically tracks coarse feature usage in the TidGi Desktop default wiki without any configuration.

!! How to disable

Open TidGi Privacy & Analytics settings and turn off analytics, or uninstall this plugin.

!! What is tracked

;`startup`
: Which plugins are installed, plus `plugin_count`. Plugin list is dynamically enumerated from the live wiki.

;`tiddler_created` / `tiddler_saved` / `tiddler_deleted`
: Fired immediately on each operation. No title or content is included.

;`search_performed`
: Fired on each search. No query text is included.

;`layout_used`
: Fired when the layout changes. Property `layout_plugin` contains the owning plugin slug.

;`feature_used`
: Fired once per feature per session. Current values include `command_palette`, `calendar`, `whiteboard`, `todolist`, `favorites`.

;`active`
: Heartbeat every 5 minutes when there is activity.

;`wiki_stats`
: Once, 8-12 minutes after boot, computed in Node.js worker. Includes `user_tiddler_count`, `size_total_chars`, `size_mean_chars`, `size_median_chars`, `size_max_chars`, `size_top10_mean`, `plugin_count`.

!! Privacy

* No tiddler titles, note content, file paths, URLs, or other user-generated text are included.
* All events pass through TidGi main-process privacy filter before delivery.
* Outside TidGi Desktop the plugin does nothing silently.
